sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue indicates strong financial performance and increased market share.

sentiment.reasoning: A significant margin improvement indicates increased profitability and operational efficiency.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
